title: RecipesXL
description: Adds new vanilla recipes to Minecraft!
body:
A datapack with the goal to add new vanilla themed recipes to Minecraft


- This datapack adds new crafting recipes to the game and one old one (The Enchanted Golden Apple recipe) to improve the Minecraft experience! Ever wanted to craft Chainmail armor? Well now you can with this datapack!

- This datapack won't affect the user's experience too much to make the game still feel vanilla, but can make crafting and getting some items a bit easier.

**If you have any ideas of recipes to add to this datapack please let me know!**
